question: Give me a preview
response:
Here's a preview of the two datasets available:

## 📊 Dataset Overview

### 1. `us_macro_quarterly_fred_126b4cea` (316 rows)
**US Macroeconomic Data (Quarterly, 1947-present)**

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `date` | Quarter date |
| `real_gdp` | Real GDP |
| `cpi` | Consumer Price Index |
| `fed_funds_rate` | Federal Funds Rate |
| `m2_money_supply` | M2 Money Supply |
| `unemployment_rate` | Unemployment Rate |
| `tbill_3m` | 3-Month T-Bill Rate |
| `treasury_10y` | 10-Year Treasury Yield |
| `nominal_gdp` | Nominal GDP |
| `gdp_growth_pct` | GDP Growth % |
| `cpi_inflation_rate` | CPI Inflation Rate |
| `yield_spread` | Yield Spread |
| `m2_growth_pct` | M2 Growth % |

**Note:** Early data (1947-1948) has many NULL values for newer metrics.

### 2. `us_macro_economic` (300 rows)
**US Economic Indicators (Monthly, 2000-present)**

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `date` | Month date |
| `gdp_growth_pct` | GDP Growth % |
| `unemployment_rate` | Unemployment Rate |
| `cpi_inflation_pct` | CPI Inflation % |
| `fed_funds_rate` | Federal Funds Rate |
| `sp500_index` | S&P 500 Index |
| `treasury_10y_yield` | 10-Year Treasury Yield |
| `consumer_confidence` | Consumer Confidence Index |
| `trade_balance_bn` | Trade Balance (Billions) |

Both tables have been saved as artifacts for reference. What would you like to explore?
